html:
Exclusive to:

“A reinforced boat with a built-in 16 slots container. They don't build them like they used to.”

-

The Archaic Boat is a Floating Platform that's exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is the same size as the Boat and provides exactly the same function, plus a unique 16 slots built-in container (which Powder Monkeys and Marotters cannot steal from). The Archaic Boat receives 60% damage from fire compared to that of a normal boat, can take a maximum of 40 damage compared to the Boat's 70 maximum damage, and is slightly more resilient with taking damage before leaks begin to emerge.

The Archaic Boat has 400 health and can be repaired with various materials.

Repair

When damaged, the Boat can be repaired by the following materials. Tree Jam, Kelp Patch and Trusty Tape can only be used on Leaks.

Item Repair Value
Boat Patch 25 (repair leak)
Boards 50
Living Log 37.5
Twigs 13
Log, Driftwood Piece 12.5
Tree Jam 20 (repair leak)
Kelp Patch 0 (repair leak temporarily: small leak - 6 minutes, large leak - 4 minutes)
Trusty Tape 0 (repair leak)

Archaic Boat Kit

The Archaic Boat Kit is not craftable and can only be acquired from Sunken Chests. There is a 50% chance to spawn in the sailing loot table of the chests, which itself has a 30% chance to be in each Sunken Chest. It creates a Archaic Boat when placed on the Ocean.

Trivia

The Archaic Boat was introduced in the Staying Afloat update.

Gallery

  • Archaic Boat concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Archaic Boat
Object Info
Perk
Have a built-in 16 slots container
Can hold multiple players.
Can hold structures.
Structure Info
400
Miscellaneous
"boat_ancient"
“"Cargo" is sailor-lingo for "stuff".”
–Wilson, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“I hope all my stuff stays dry in there.”
–Willow, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“Hmm... how many potatoes could Wolfgang store in there?”
–Wolfgang, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“I could put things in there. I guess.”
–Wendy, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“CARGO? I THOUGHT WE WERE BUILDING A BRIG”
–WX-78, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“This vessel is outfitted with a convenient storage receptacle.”
–Wickerbottom, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“Should help keep everything safely stowed away.”
–Woodie, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“Now those apes won't get their grubby hands on my loot.”
–Maxwell, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“My störes are well defended 'neath the deck öf my ship.”
–Wigfrid, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“That's where we hide all our favorite toys.”
–Webber, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“A ship should always have a cargo hold stocked with provisions.”
–Warly, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“Put stuff in Floaty's belly”
–Wormwood, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“Plenty of space for storage.”
–Winona, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“To hide my prize from prying primate eyes.”
–Wortox, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“Hidey-hole for stuff.”
–Wurt, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“This should keep our supplies safe, Woby.”
–Walter, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“It's probably a good idea not to leave all my valuables out on the deck.”
–Wanda, examining the container of an Archaic Boat.
“A reinforced boat with a built-in 16 slots container. They don't build them like they used to.”
-
The Archaic Boat is a Floating Platform that's exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is the same size as the Boat and provides exactly the same function, plus a unique 16 slots built-in container (which Powder Monkeys and Marotters cannot steal from). The Archaic Boat receives 60% damage from fire compared to that of a normal boat, can take a maximum of 40 damage compared to the Boat's 70 maximum damage, and is slightly more resilient with taking damage before leaks begin to emerge.
The Archaic Boat has 400 health and can be repaired with various materials.
Repair[edit | edit source]
When damaged, the Boat can be repaired by the following materials. Tree Jam, Kelp Patch and Trusty Tape can only be used on Leaks.
Item
Repair Value
Boat Patch
25 (repair leak)

50

Archaic Boat Kit[edit | edit source]
Archaic Boat Kit
Object Info
3 min.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Source
Dropped by
(15%)
Miscellaneous
"boat_ancient_item"
“I guess I'm doing this the old-fashioned way.”
–Wilson, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Ew, it smells old!”
–Willow, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Wolfgang will build mighty ship!”
–Wolfgang, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“It looks like it will be quite sturdy. Oh well.”
–Wendy, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“FOR BUILDING A HORRIBLE OLD BOAT”
–WX-78, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“The style is reminiscent of the ships from days of old.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“This boat's made of some solid old-growth lumber.”
–Woodie, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“It's not old, it's "classic."”
–Maxwell, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“I shall build a vessel like the tales öf öld.”
–Wigfrid, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Building a new boat to look old? We don't get it...”
–Webber, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Ah, a fine vintage.”
–Warly, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Needs water”
–Wormwood, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“They sure don't build 'em like they used to.”
–Winona, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“This old boat will surely float!”
–Wortox, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Why make boat that already old, florp?”
–Wurt, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“Is this really how they used to build boats in the olden days?”
–Walter, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
“This old thing better be seaworthy...”
–Wanda, examining an Archaic Boat Kit.
The Archaic Boat Kit is not craftable and can only be acquired from Sunken Chests. There is a 50% chance to spawn in the sailing loot table of the chests, which itself has a 30% chance to be in each Sunken Chest. It creates a Archaic Boat when placed on the Ocean.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Archaic Boat was introduced in the Staying Afloat update.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Archaic Boat concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thuyền Cổ là một Bệ Nổi độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó có cùng kích thước với Thuyền và cung cấp chức năng giống hệt nhau, cộng thêm một thùng chứa tích hợp 16 khe độc ​​đáo (mà Powder Monkey và Marotters không thể lấy trộm). Thuyền cổ xưa nhận 60% sát thương từ lửa so với thuyền bình thường, có thể chịu tối đa 40 sát thương so với 70 sát thương tối đa của Thuyền và có khả năng phục hồi tốt hơn một chút khi nhận sát thương trước khi rò rỉ bắt đầu xuất hiện.
